palettes.name: Earthy Terracotta
palettes.description: Warm, grounded tones reflecting clay, soil, and natural dyes. Ideal for pottery and block prints.

palettes.name: Royal Indigo
palettes.description: Deep, majestic blues and golds. Ideal for premium heritage crafts, silk weaving, and regal metalwork.

palettes.name: Vibrant Saffron
palettes.description: High-energy, saturated festive colors. Perfect for embroidery, festive wear, and lively regional arts.

palettes.name: Minimal Sand
palettes.description: Restrained, natural, and highly modern. Great for contemporary adaptations, minimalist decor, and stark geometric prints.

palettes.name: Forest Vermillion
palettes.description: Rich greens offset by sharp vermillion reds. Strong connection to folklore, tribal art, and organic materials.

illustration_languages.name: Block Print Stamp
illustration_languages.description: Imperfect edges, monochromatic ink dispersion, mimics hand-carved wooden blocks.

illustration_languages.name: Fine Line Etching
illustration_languages.description: Highly geometric, intricate, crisp lines. Appeals to precision crafts like Maheshwari weaving or filigree.

illustration_languages.name: Fluid Watercolor
illustration_languages.description: Soft edges, bleeding tones, organic spreads. Mirrors dyeing techniques like Batik or Bandhani.

illustration_languages.name: Modern Minimal Vector
illustration_languages.description: Clean, flat geometric shapes. Modernizes traditional motifs for a highly premium, urban audience.
